final:
module top_module(input [7:0] obf_a, b,
            output [7:0] c, d, e, f, g, h, i, j, k);assign c = obf_a & b;               
    assign d = obf_a | b;               
    assign e = obf_a ^ b;               
    assign f = ~obf_a;                  
    assign g = {obf_a[3:0], b[3:0]};    
    assign h = obf_a >> 3;              
    assign i = &b;                  
    assign j = (obf_a > b) ? obf_a : b;     
    assign k = obf_a - b;               
endmodule
